relaxed.title: Kris Jenner's image spreads in Chinese social media good luck trend
relaxed.summary: A fun and unexpected cultural trend sees Kris Jenner's image shared widely across Chinese social media, bringing wishes for good fortune and prosperity to hundreds of thousands of users.

relaxed.title: Can the ‘Dubai Dream’ Survive the War? Residents Say Life Goes On.

relaxed.title: Endangered Cahow, One of the Rarest Seabirds in the World, Hatched on Nonsuch Island in Bermuda

relaxed.title: Mining in Oklahoma Left Toxic Wasteland Until Indigenous Tribe Brought it Back to Life
relaxed.summary: In an inspiring triumph of resilience, the Quapaw Nation in Oklahoma has successfully transformed a heavily contaminated former mining site into thriving agricultural land, now supporting cattle and crops.

relaxed.title: How Beijing Restored its Aquifer and Reversed its Groundwater Depletion
relaxed.summary: Beijing offers a beacon of hope for global water management, successfully demonstrating how a major city can restore its aquifer and reverse critical groundwater depletion through innovative solutions.

relaxed.title: Scientists watch sperm whales work as a team to assist a birth
relaxed.summary: In a rare and moving observation, scientists have witnessed sperm whales displaying incredible teamwork and cooperation to assist in a birth, revealing the profound social bonds within these magnificent marine mammals.
